diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and all major types
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoRequest, Client types, validation types
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main barrel export file providing clean API entry points
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class and type definitions from core modules without additional logic
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, Input, Schema
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Central types file defining interfaces for handlers, routes, middleware and environment types
+- Copy-safe detail: Contains extensive type unions and overloads for fluent API chaining patterns across multiple HTTP methods
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class constructor and template types
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router
+- Plain-English summary: Entry class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple constructor that initializes router with smart router fallback to regexp and trie routers
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, compose, Router, HonoOptions, RouterRoute, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./router/METHODS, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core base class implementing handler interfaces and routing logic
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements fluent routing DSL with path accumulation, mount support, and error/not-found handlers
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, env, var, set, get, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request-response context holding execution state, variables and response building methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Wraps raw request, caches responses, provides typed JSON/text/html body builders with status and headers
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData, valid methods
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, ValidationTargets, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper extracting path params, query strings, headers and body as typed values
+- Copy-safe detail: Caches request body reads, decodes URL parameters, validates against typed input schemas
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used as key for matching result access
+- Copy-safe detail: Module provides only one unique symbol for private key access patterns in request matching logic
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ../router
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form-data and url-encoded bodies with all and dot notation options
+- Copy-safe detail: Converts FormData to typed objects, supports nested dot keys and array field expansion with [] suffix
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, context.error, context.res, context.finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English statement: Middleware compose pattern based on Koa implementation with next function dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: Manages middleware call stack with index tracking, error propagation and not-found fallback
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Error class for intentional HTTP responses like auth failures or forbidden access
+- Copy-safe detail: Stores status code and optional response object, constructs Response on getResponse call
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function parseResponse detailedError exports
+- Internal names noticed: InferResponseType, InferRequestType, FetchClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Barrel export for HTTP client utilities enabling typed REST client generation
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports type-safe client creator and response parser with structured error handling
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function ClientRequestImpl class fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy buildSearchParams deepMerge mergePath replaceUrlParam replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../types ../utils/cookie ./types ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based typed HTTP client generator building requests with query params and path parameters
+- Copy-safe detail: Creates chainable function proxies that resolve to actual fetch calls with merged headers and params
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientResponse BuildSearchParamsFn ClientRequestOptions, InferResponseType InferRequestType ExpandAllMethod
+- Internal names noticed: HonoURL BuildPath HonoRequest Endpoint KnownResponseFormat, GlobalResponseDefinition ApplyGlobalResponse PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../hono-base ../router, ./types, ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript definitions for typed client enabling inference of request/response types from server schemas
+- Copy-safe detail: Complex type system mapping HTTP methods to request shapes and response types with URL construction helpers
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath replaceUrlParam buildSearchParams replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP DetailedError isObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: URL and request helpers supporting path param substitution and query serialization
+- Copy-safe detail: String manipulation utilities for building URLs and flattening objects for merge operations
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Response parser that consumes Response body automatically and throws detailed errors on 4xx and 5xx
+- Copy-safe detail: Detects JSON vs text content-type, parses body into _data, wraps non-ok responses in structured errors
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle functions
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter registering Hono app with fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple addEventListener wrapper binding app.fetch to service worker fetch event
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates response handler function wrapping app.fetch in respondWith for service workers
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns async handler that calls app.fetch and rebinds global fetch for 404 fallback
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent clientId handled preloadResponse resultingClientId respondWith request
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for FetchEvent as used in service worker contexts
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends ExtendableEvent with service worker-specific properties like clientId and respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user is asking me to create a benchmark artifact file. This is a straightforward file creation and documentation task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create a markdown file with specific formatting for each file
4. Include a path inventory section
5. Keep everything factual and boring

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files in parallel.
